name: ecommerce-api
postCreateCommand: npm install && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && node_ver=$(grep nodejs .tool-versions | awk '{print $2}' | cut -d. -f1) && running=$(node --version | sed 's/v//' | cut -d. -f1) && [ "$node_ver" = "$running" ] || echo "WARNING: .tool-versions requires Node $node_ver but container is running Node $running — update NODE_VERSION in .devcontainer/Dockerfile and devcontainer.json"
